category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and lawn/garden electric or cordless power tools exported from China to Rwanda.

title.en: China-to-Rwanda Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入卢旺达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入盧旺達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Rwanda RSB requirements, including PVoC pre-export verification, RS/IEC electrical safety, EMC, noise, restricted substances, and battery and radio considerations for cordless tools.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与卢旺达 RSB 要求差距对照，涵盖 PVoC 出口前符合性验证、RS/IEC 电气安全、电磁兼容、噪声、限用物质，以及无绳工具的电池和无线电考量。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與盧旺達 RSB 要求差距對照，涵蓋 PVoC 出口前符合性驗證、RS/IEC 電氣安全、電磁相容、噪聲、限用物質，以及無繩工具的電池和無線電考量。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Rwanda law, RS standards, RSB PVoC and S-Mark obligations, RURA radio requirements, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行卢旺达法律、RS 标准、RSB PVoC 及 S 标志义务、RURA 无线电要求及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行盧旺達法律、RS 標準、RSB PVoC 及 S 標誌義務、RURA 無線電要求及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Rwanda, the practical baseline is RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) with a Certificate of Conformity before shipment, conformity to RS standards that adopt the relevant IEC electrical-safety series (RS/IEC 62841), and an S-Mark where required; cordless tools with wireless functions may also fall under RURA radio authorisation, and Rwanda is landlocked so goods route via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入卢旺达，实务基线是出货前完成 RSB 出口前符合性验证（PVoC）并取得符合性证书、符合采用相关 IEC 电气安全系列的 RS 标准（RS/IEC 62841），并在需要时加贴 S 标志；具无线功能的无绳工具还可能受 RURA 无线电许可管辖，且卢旺达为内陆国，货物经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆转运。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入盧旺達，實務基線是出貨前完成 RSB 出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）並取得符合性證書、符合採用相關 IEC 電氣安全系列的 RS 標準（RS/IEC 62841），並在需要時加貼 S 標誌；具無線功能的無繩工具還可能受 RURA 無線電許可管轄，且盧旺達為內陸國，貨物經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆轉運。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
